attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SWDBEI.	ID                            	,
SWDBEI.	SERVICE_WEB_ORDER_ID          	,
SWDBEI.	SERVICE_QUOTE_NUMBER          	,
SWDBEI.	CISCO_CREATED_FLAG            	,
SWDBEI.	EVENT_TYPE                    	,
SWDBEI.	CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATETIME    	,
SWDBEI.	CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATE        	,
SWDBEI.	CHANGE_IDENTIFIER             	,
SWDBEI.	EXPIRATION_DATE               	,
SWDBEI.	EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DATE      	,
SWDBEI.	TRANSACTION_ID                	,
SWDBEI.	DISTI_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER      	,
SWDBEI.	DISTI_RESELLER_SO_LINE_NUMBER 	,
SWDBEI.	PROMO_NUMBER                  	,
SWDBEI.	CONVERSION_RATE               	,
SWDBEI.	SOURCE_PROFILE_ID             	,
SWDBEI.	WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID           	,
SWDBEI.	WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID           	,
SWDBEI.	WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID          	,
SWDBEI.	WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID           	,
SWDBEI.	CURRENCY_CODE                 	,
SWDBEI.	DEAL_ID                       	,
SWDBEI.	DROP_SHIP                     	,
SWDBEI.	COST_UNIT_PRICE               	,
SWDBEI.	OFFICIAL                      	,
SWDBEI.	ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE     	,
SWDBEI.	REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE       	,
SWDBEI.	REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE           	,
SWDBEI.	REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC        	,
SWDBEI.	QUANTITY                      	,
SWDBEI.	POSTED_DATE                   	,
SWDBEI.	ACTIVE_FLAG                   	,
SWDBEI.	DISTI_BOOK_DATE               	,
SWDBEI.	RESELLER_DISTI_PO_NUMBER      	,
SWDBEI.	VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE      	,
SWDBEI.	VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC   	,
SWDBEI.	VALUATION_PRICE               	,
SWDBEI.	VALUATION_PRICE_LC            	,
SWDBEI.	MFG_PART_NUMBER               	,
SWDBEI.	DISTI_RESELLER_SO_DATE        	,
SWDBEI.	ORIG_TRANSACTION_ID             	,
SWDBEI.	LAST_UPDATED_DATE             	,
SWDBEI.	BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE          	,
SWDBEI.	SERVICE_TYPE                  	,
SWDBEI.	SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE          	,
SWDBEI.	SERVICE_BOOKING_DURATION      	,
SWDBEI.	CISCO_BOOKED                  	,
SWDBEI.	DSV_UNIQUE_ID                  ,
SWDBEI.	D2D_FLAG                  ,
SWDBEI.	CREATE_DATETIME               	,
SWDBEI.	BATCH_ID                      	,
SWDBEI.	ACTION_CODE                   	,
'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE                  ,
SWDBEI.STATUS,
SWDBEI.REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
SWDBEI.ORIGINAL_BOOKING_REF_ID,
 /* Added as part of SFP  Rel */
SWDBEI.MAGIC_KEY ,
SWDBEI.START_DATE ,
SWDBEI.END_DATE ,
SWDBEI.DURATION,
SWDBEI.NET_PRICE_FLAG,
SWDBEI.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE,/*Added as part of SFP Rel - OCT*/
SWDBEI.GPL_PRICE,   /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
SWDBEI.GPL_PRICE_LC /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
SWDBEI.CHANGE_REASON_DESC, /*added as part of MBR DSV reason cancellation changes*/
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
SWDBEI.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
SWDBEI.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
SWDBEI.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_DSV_BOOKINGS_EDW_INTF SWDBEI
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 
        		FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE BILL_TO,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SOLD_TO,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SHIP_TO,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE END_CUST,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
WHERE SWDBEI.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID = BILL_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
AND SWDBEI.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID = SOLD_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
AND SWDBEI.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID = SHIP_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
AND SWDBEI.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID=END_CUST.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
AND SWDBEI.MFG_PART_NUMBER = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )

SELECT
COALESCE(SWDBEI.SERVICE_WEB_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN')  BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,               
COALESCE(SWDBEI.SERVICE_QUOTE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') BK_QUOTE_NUM,                  
COALESCE(SWDBEI.CISCO_CREATED_FLAG,'N') CISCO_CREATED_FLG,             
COALESCE(SWDBEI.EVENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') DSV_EVENT_CD,                 
COALESCE(SWDBEI.CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATETIME,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DTM ,      
COALESCE(SWDBEI.CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DT,     
SWDBEI.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_TXT,         
COALESCE(SWDBEI.EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) EXPIRATION_DT  ,               
COALESCE(SWDBEI.EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DT,        
COALESCE(SWDBEI.TRANSACTION_ID,-9999) BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  ,   
SWDBEI.DISTI_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER  , 
SWDBEI.DISTI_RESELLER_SO_LINE_NUMBER DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER     ,     
COALESCE(SWDBEI.D2D_FLAG,'=') AS DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG  ,      
SWDBEI.REPORTED_DEAL_ID AS DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,  
SWDBEI.CONVERSION_RATE CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,      
COALESCE(SWDBEI.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,-999) BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT ,  
SHIP_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,    
BILL_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
END_CUST.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY, 
SOLD_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,   
CAST(SWDBEI.CURRENCY_CODE AS VARCHAR(3)) BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,    
SWDBEI.DEAL_ID BK_DEAL_ID,                    
-999 BATCH_ID_INT,                  
COALESCE(SWDBEI.DROP_SHIP,'=') DROP_SHIP_FLAG   ,             
SWDBEI.COST_UNIT_PRICE DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
 COALESCE(SWDBEI.OFFICIAL,'=') OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG          ,  
SWDBEI.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE AS RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT,
0 AS RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT,   
0 AS PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT  , 
0 AS RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT ,
SWDBEI.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT  , 
SWDBEI.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,    
SWDBEI.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT  ,   
(CASE
   WHEN SWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE IS NOT NULL
   THEN SWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE
   ELSE SWDBEI.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE 
   END) *
(CASE 
   WHEN SWDBEI.QUANTITY IS NOT NULL
   THEN SWDBEI.QUANTITY 
   ELSE 0
   END) AS  PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,      
NP.ITEM_KEY PRODUCT_KEY ,                  
SWDBEI.QUANTITY POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT ,   
SWDBEI.POSTED_DATE POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE ,     
COALESCE(SWDBEI.ACTIVE_FLAG,'=') POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG    ,  
SWDBEI.DISTI_BOOK_DATE TRANSACTION_DATE       ,       
SWDBEI.RESELLER_DISTI_PO_NUMBER RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    ,
SWDBEI.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT , 
SWDBEI.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
SWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,
SWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE_LC VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT  ,
'-999' AS DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER,
'=' AS PROMOTION_NAME    ,                   
'=' AS ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE    ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,             
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,              
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,               
SWDBEI.ACTION_CODE    ,               
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.DISTI_RESELLER_SO_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DSTRBTR_RSLR_SALES_ORDER_DT  ,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.ORIG_TRANSACTION_ID ,-9999) AS PARENT_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
SWDBEI.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,
SWDBEI.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE AS BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.SERVICE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.SERVICE_BOOKING_DURATION,-999) AS SERVICE_BKG_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.CISCO_BOOKED,'N') AS CISCO_BOOKED_FLG,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.DSV_UNIQUE_ID ,-9999) AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
SWDBEI.STATUS AS LINE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.PROMO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS PROMOTION_NUM,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.ORIGINAL_BOOKING_REF_ID ,-9999) AS RU_BK_ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
SWDBEI.MAGIC_KEY ,
SWDBEI.START_DATE ,
SWDBEI.END_DATE ,
SWDBEI.DURATION,
COALESCE(SWDBEI.NET_PRICE_FLAG,'N') as NET_PRICE_FLAG,
SWDBEI.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE, /*Added as part of SFP Rel - OCT*/
SWDBEI.CHANGE_REASON_DESC, /*added as part of MBR DSV reason cancellation changes*/
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
SWDBEI.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
SWDBEI.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
SWDBEI.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_DSV_BOOKINGS_EDW_INTF SWDBEI

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE BILL_TO
ON SWDBEI.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID = BILL_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SOLD_TO
ON SWDBEI.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID = SOLD_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SHIP_TO
ON SWDBEI.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID = SHIP_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE END_CUST
ON SWDBEI.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID = END_CUST.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON SWDBEI.MFG_PART_NUMBER = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID



UNION ALL

SELECT
COALESCE(EWDBEI.SERVICE_WEB_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN')  BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,               
COALESCE(EWDBEI.SERVICE_QUOTE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') BK_QUOTE_NUM,                  
COALESCE(EWDBEI.CISCO_CREATED_FLAG,'N') CISCO_CREATED_FLG,             
COALESCE(EWDBEI.EVENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') DSV_EVENT_CD,                 
COALESCE(EWDBEI.CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATETIME,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DTM ,      
COALESCE(EWDBEI.CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DT,     
EWDBEI.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_TXT,         
COALESCE(EWDBEI.EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) EXPIRATION_DT  ,               
COALESCE(EWDBEI.EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DT,        
COALESCE(EWDBEI.TRANSACTION_ID,-9999) BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  ,   
EWDBEI.DISTI_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER  , 
EWDBEI.DISTI_RESELLER_SO_LINE_NUMBER DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER     ,     
COALESCE(EWDBEI.D2D_FLAG,'=') AS DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG  ,      
EWDBEI.REPORTED_DEAL_ID AS  DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,  
EWDBEI.CONVERSION_RATE CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,      
COALESCE(EWDBEI.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,-999) BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT ,  
SHIP_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,    
BILL_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
END_CUST.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY, 
SOLD_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY AS BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,   
CAST(EWDBEI.CURRENCY_CODE AS VARCHAR(3)) BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,    
EWDBEI.DEAL_ID BK_DEAL_ID,                    
-999 BATCH_ID_INT,                  
COALESCE(EWDBEI.DROP_SHIP,'=') DROP_SHIP_FLAG   ,             
EWDBEI.COST_UNIT_PRICE DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
 COALESCE(EWDBEI.OFFICIAL,'=') OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG          ,  
EWDBEI.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE AS RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT,
0 AS RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT,   
0 AS PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT  , 
0 AS RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT ,
EWDBEI.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT  , 
EWDBEI.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,    
EWDBEI.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT  ,   
(CASE
   WHEN EWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE IS NOT NULL
   THEN EWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE
   ELSE EWDBEI.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE 
   END) *
(CASE 
   WHEN EWDBEI.QUANTITY IS NOT NULL
   THEN EWDBEI.QUANTITY 
   ELSE 0
   END) AS  PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,      
NP.ITEM_KEY PRODUCT_KEY ,                  
EWDBEI.QUANTITY POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT ,   
EWDBEI.POSTED_DATE POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE ,     
COALESCE(EWDBEI.ACTIVE_FLAG,'=') POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG    ,  
EWDBEI.DISTI_BOOK_DATE TRANSACTION_DATE       ,       
EWDBEI.RESELLER_DISTI_PO_NUMBER RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    ,
EWDBEI.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT , 
EWDBEI.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
EWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,
EWDBEI.VALUATION_PRICE_LC VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT  ,
'-999' AS DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER,
'=' AS PROMOTION_NAME    ,                   
'=' AS ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE    ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,             
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,              
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,               
EWDBEI.ACTION_CODE    ,               
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.DISTI_RESELLER_SO_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DSTRBTR_RSLR_SALES_ORDER_DT  ,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.ORIG_TRANSACTION_ID ,-9999) AS PARENT_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
EWDBEI.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,
EWDBEI.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE AS BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.SERVICE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.SERVICE_BOOKING_DURATION,-999) AS SERVICE_BKG_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.CISCO_BOOKED,'N') AS CISCO_BOOKED_FLG,
 COALESCE(EWDBEI.DSV_UNIQUE_ID ,-9999) AS  BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,

EWDBEI.STATUS AS LINE_STATUS_CD,

COALESCE(EWDBEI.PROMO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS PROMOTION_NUM,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.ORIGINAL_BOOKING_REF_ID ,-9999) AS RU_BK_ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM ,
/* Added as part of SFP  Rel */
EWDBEI.MAGIC_KEY ,
EWDBEI.START_DATE ,
EWDBEI.END_DATE ,
EWDBEI.DURATION,
COALESCE(EWDBEI.NET_PRICE_FLAG,'N') as NET_PRICE_FLAG,
EWDBEI.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE,/*Added as part of SFP Rel - OCT*/
EWDBEI.GPL_PRICE,   /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
EWDBEI.GPL_PRICE_LC, /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
EWDBEI.CHANGE_REASON_DESC, /*added as part of MBR DSV reason cancellation changes*/
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
EWDBEI.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
EWDBEI.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
EWDBEI.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_WIPS_DSV_BOOKINGS_EDW_INTF EWDBEI 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE BILL_TO
ON EWDBEI.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID = BILL_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SOLD_TO
ON EWDBEI.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID = SOLD_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SHIP_TO
ON EWDBEI.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID = SHIP_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE END_CUST
ON EWDBEI.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID = END_CUST.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON EWDBEI.MFG_PART_NUMBER = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
